description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a well-proportioned, athletic build. She is dressed in a two-piece outfit consisting of a ruffled bikini-style top and high-waisted shorts, both with visible bow accents. Her skin is smooth and evenly toned, and her facial features are symmetrical and expressive. She stands barefoot with arms extended outward in a relaxed, neutral pose. Her hair is styled in a long, straight ponytail that extends down her back. The overall appearance is casual and suitable for warm weather or recreational urban environments.
description: An athletic adult woman in a bikini-style top and high-waisted shorts, standing barefoot with a long ponytail and arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ruffled bikini top, high-waisted shorts, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, chest, and the length of the ponytail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shorts, the ponytail's full length, and the shoulder blades.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and ponytail from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: bikini-style ruffled top and high-waisted shorts
